quotes: Limit focal points per section — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.
Generous white space; clean, never cluttered. **Limit focal points per section** — use contrast to direct attention to the single most important element.

rules.intent: Maintain clean layouts by avoiding competing visual focal points within any single section.
rules.rule_text: To maintain clean, uncluttered visual rhythm, each section must be limited to a single focal point, utilizing contrast to direct the reader's attention.

quotes: Color blocks delineate topics (My Compass webpage pattern) — alternate White / Light Blue / Golden Sand / gradient section backgrounds so adjacent assembled sections don't visually merge. **[GENERAL]: section designers must declare their section's background color in the component metadata so assemblers can sequence without two identical adjacent backgrounds.**

rules.intent: Delineate different topics clearly using alternating background color blocks so adjacent sections do not visually merge.
rules.rule_text: Section background colors must alternate (selecting from White #ffffff, Light Blue #E6F0F9, Golden Sand #FEF1C8, or gradient options) such that adjacent assembled sections do not use identical backgrounds. Designers must declare the background color in the component metadata for sequencing purposes.

quotes: Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern

Bold headline + simple benefit statements + patient quote is the canonical content block pattern (per patient brochure, which is the **reference template for visuals, messaging, and overall tone of ALL LISRAYA materials**).

rules.intent: Maintain consistency with the reference patient brochure for visuals, messaging, and overall tone across Lisraya materials.
rules.rule_text: The canonical content block pattern (derived from the patient brochure reference template) consists of a bold headline followed by simple benefit statements and a patient quote.
